=== 1962-09-22 Carnegie Hall, New York City, New York, USA.txt
===================
===================
===================
Carnegie Hall
New York City, New York
September 22, 1962

Carnegie Hall Hootenanny

*****  This is the same recording as LB-3525  *****
Based on identical track lengths...
http://jokerman.org.uk/lb/detail/LB-03525.html

Taper: unidentified
Source: no information
Lineage: received as FLAC files; short text file provided from trader; song titles are renamed
LB-Rating: C+
UploaderFrequencyAnalyzer: nothing above 6kHz


1. Sally Gal [03:06]
2. Highway 51 (Curtis Jones) [04:08]
3. Talking John Birch Paranoid Blues [04:31]
4. Ballad Of Hollis Brown [05:36]
5. A Hard Rain's A-Gonna Fall [07:16]
Total time [24:38]

Bob Dylan (guitar & vocal)
1-3 Bob Dylan (harmonica)

NOTE: Pete Seeger introduces Bob Dylan

Mono audience broadcast, 26 minutes

=== Info (accompanying trade).txt
===================
===================
===================
Carnegie Hall	   
New York City, New York	   
22 September 1962	   

Carnegie Hall Hootenanny	 
  
1. Sally Gal		   
2. Highway 51 (Curtis Jones)		   
3. Talking John Birch Paranoid Blues		   
4. Ballad Of Hollis Brown		   
5. A Hard Rain's A-Gonna Fall		 

Bob Dylan (guitar & vocal).
1-3 Bob Dylan (harmonica).

Note. Pete Seeger introduces Bob Dylan.
